deferred: 6.7 (uses pre-ndk-build layout: Release-android/makefile + arm-linux-androideabi-gcc toolchain, deprecated in NDK r17+ and removed in r24+; verified 2026-05-28)
7.0 (still pre-ndk-build; introduces AndroidStudio dir but no ndk-build target)
notes: Upstream APP_ABI default is 'x86 armeabi-v7a arm64-v8a'; build.sh rewrites it per-run.
x86_64 builds require build.sh's per-run APP_ABI override since upstream omits it.
ndk-build/EXECUTABLE/jni layout was introduced in CE 7.1 (Feb 2020); 7.1..7.5 share it.
build.sh must invoke ndk-build with RELATIVE paths because 'Cheat Engine' contains a space that breaks make's whitespace-based variable splitting.
